2603.22690.title: WiFi2Cap: Semantic Action Captioning from Wi-Fi CSI via Limb-Level Semantic Alignment
2603.22690.paper_summary: Privacy-preserving semantic understanding of human activities is important for indoor sensing, yet existing Wi-Fi CSI-based systems mainly focus on pose estimation or predefined action classification rather than fine-grained language generation. Mapping CSI to natural-language descriptions remains challenging because of the semantic gap between wireless signals and language and direction-sensitive ambiguities such as left/right limb confusion. We propose WiFi2Cap, a three-stage framework for generating action captions directly from Wi-Fi CSI. A vision-language teacher learns transferable supervision from synchronized video-text pairs, and a CSI student is aligned to the teacher's visual space and text embeddings. To improve direction-sensitive captioning, we introduce a Mirror-Consistency Loss that reduces mirrored-action and left-right ambiguities during cross-modal alignment. A prefix-tuned language model then generates action descriptions from CSI embeddings. We also introduce the WiFi2Cap Dataset, a synchronized CSI-RGB-sentence benchmark for semantic captioning from Wi-Fi signals. Experimental results show that WiFi2Cap consistently outperforms baseline methods on BLEU-4, METEOR, ROUGE-L, CIDEr, and SPICE, demonstrating effective privacy-friendly semantic sensing.
2603.22690.paper_summary_zh: 隱私保護的人類活動語義理解對於室內感測非常重要，然而現有的基於 Wi-Fi CSI 的系統主要集中在姿勢估計或預定義的動作分類，而非細緻的語言生成。將 CSI 映射到自然語言描述仍然具有挑戰性，因為無線信號與語言之間存在語義差距，以及方向敏感的模糊性，如左右肢體混淆。我們提出了 WiFi2Cap，一個三階段的框架，用於直接從 Wi-Fi CSI 生成動作標題。一個視覺-語言教師從同步的視頻-文本對中學習可轉移的監督，而 CSI 學生則與教師的視覺空間和文本嵌入對齊。為了改善方向敏感的標題生成，我們引入了一種鏡像一致性損失，減少在跨模態對齊過程中出現的鏡像動作和左右模糊性。然後，一個前綴調整的語言模型從 CSI 嵌入生成動作描述。我們還介紹了 WiFi2Cap 數據集，這是一個同步的 CSI-RGB-句子基準，用於從 Wi-Fi 信號進行語義標題生成。實驗結果顯示，WiFi2Cap 在 BLEU-4、METEOR、ROUGE-L、CIDEr 和 SPICE 上始終超越基線方法，顯示出有效的隱私友好語義感測。
2603.22690.author: Tzu-Ti Wei et.al.
2603.22690.authors: Tzu-Ti Wei, Chu-Yu Huang, Yu-Chee Tseng, Jen-Jee Chen
